item.title: Version 0.0.31
item.description: - Refreshed automation reliability to prevent opaque "operation aborted" runs: shared preflight checks, dynamic Debug app discovery, deterministic app selection, and explicit startup/readiness health checks in `scripts/lib/test_common.sh`. - Hardened App Exposé runtime state handling under rapid churn by confirming invocation evidence before committing tracking state, plus explicit rollback/reset when invocation is unconfirmed. - Improved event-tap timeout recovery and reduced debug logging pressure to avoid stale/latching interaction state after tap timeout conditions.
